pre_diagnosis.title: Ka hor Ogaanshaha
pre_diagnosis.description: Waxaan shakisannahay inay ilmahaygii awtism leeyahay waxaana raadinayaa jawaabaha

newly_diagnosed.title: Si Dhow Loo Ogaaday
newly_diagnosed.description: Ilmahaygii dhow ayaa la ogaaday waxaana ka fiirsanayaa tallaabada xigta

on_waitlist.title: Liiska Sugitaanka
on_waitlist.description: Waxaan sugnaa adeegyada daawaynta waxaana u baahan gargaar hadda

older_child.title: Ilmo Weyn
older_child.description: Ilmahaygii waa weynaaday waxaana la dagaallanaa caqabadaha cusub

track.title: Halkee aad ku jirtaa socdaalkaaga?
track.subtitle: Waxaan gaar u sameyn doonaa khibradaada xaaladaada ku salaysan

profile.title: Noogu sheeg ilmahaaga
profile.subtitle: Tani waxay na caawisaa in aan gaar u sameynno hawlaha maalinlaha
profile.name: Magaca ilmaha

home.crisis: Ma u baahan tahay gargaar hadda?

skills.title: Dugsi Daryeel-nafsi
skills.subtitle: Baro xirfadaha si aad ugu taageerto ilmahaaga maalin kasta

step1.title: Tallaabooyinka 1: Badbaadada horeba
step1.description: Hubi in ilmahaaga iyo dadka ku xeeran jirkooda nabdoon yihiin.

step2.title: Tallaabo 2: Yaree Culaysyada
step2.description: Hoos u dhig iftiinka haddii suurtogal ah. Yaree cod dhaadheer. Siiy ilmahaaga meel.

step3.title: Tallaabo 3: La xidh oo Sug
step3.description: Fadhi agtiisa heerka isaga. Hurricanku wuu dhammaanayaa.
